user.title: BusWhere Shuttle Tracker
user.description:
Enter the BusWhere route URL from your browser.

Example: https://buswhere.com/theory/routes/theory_shuttle

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to BusWhere. Check the URL and try again.
error.no_data: No shuttle data found at this URL.

init.title: Rename Shuttle Stops
init.description:
Customize the name for each stop. Leave blank to use the default address.

{stop_info}
